codeReview.summary: Feature implementation matches the security-hardening requirements: strict CSP (including connect-src 'none'), additional security-oriented meta tags, no storage API usage in app source, no external/third-party resource usage, and dedicated tests validating these assertions.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit d2ffd7b diff/stat, transcript skeleton, and ui-worker skill. No blocking or non-blocking code defects were found for this feature; implementation satisfies the specified hardening scope.
